posts.caption:
Big beach project? Weve got you covered.

Renovating on LBI this summer? Dont let your materials sit in the rain. Surfbox delivers portable storage containers right to your job site - keep your lumber, tools, and supplies locked up and weather-tight all season.

Delivered to your door
Secure and weather-proof
Rent by the month
Perfect for contractors and homeowners

Your project deserves better than a tarp and a prayer.

Serving Ocean County and beyond
609-709-9000
www.surfboxstorage.com

#Surfbox #PortableStorage #LBI #Construction #JerseyShore #BeachRenovation #ContractorLife #StorageSolutions #OceanCounty
